# starcitizen_wiki_api.model.GameItem

## Load the model package
```dart
import 'package:starcitizen_wiki_api/api.dart';
```

## Properties
Name | Type | Description | Notes
------------ | ------------- | ------------- | -------------
**uuid** | **String** | Unique identifier of the item. | [optional] 
**slug** | **String** | URL-friendly slug for the item. | [optional] 
**name** | **String** | Display name of the item. | [optional] 
**className** | **String** | Internal class name of the item definition. | [optional] 
**classification** | **String** | Classification generated by ScDataDumper. | [optional] 
**classificationLabel** | **String** | Human-readable label for the item classification | [optional] 
**description** | [**GameItemDescription**](GameItemDescription.md) |  | [optional] 
**size** | **int** | Item size from AttachDef. Vehicle items range 1-12, FPS items are smaller. | [optional] 
**mass** | **double** | Physical mass in kilograms from SEntityRigidPhysicsControllerParams. | [optional] 
**rarity** | **String** | Item rarity from stdItem.Rarity. Only present when the item has rarity data. | [optional] 
**eventSource** | **List&lt;String&gt;** | Event or reward source labels for limited/event items. Empty for regular items. | [optional] 
**isBaseVariant** | **bool** | Whether this item is the base variant (has no parent variant). | [optional] 
**isCraftable** | **bool** | Whether this item can be crafted via blueprints. | [optional] 
**blueprint** | [**List&lt;GameItemBlueprintInner&gt;**](GameItemBlueprintInner.md) | Crafting blueprints that produce this item. Only returned when the item is craftable. Use include=blueprints to get full blueprint data instead of links. | [optional] 
**grade** | **String** | Only returned for Ship.* items (derived formatting for ship grades). | [optional] 
**class_** | **String** | Only returned for Ship.* items. | [optional] 
**descriptionData** | [**List&lt;ItemDescriptionData&gt;**](ItemDescriptionData.md) | Key/value pairs derived from the item description. | [optional] 
**manufacturerDescription** | **String** | Manufacturer name extracted from the description data entries. | [optional] 
**manufacturer** | [**ManufacturerLink**](ManufacturerLink.md) |  | [optional] 
**type** | **String** | Item type identifier (NOITEM_ prefix removed), e.g. Weapon, Armor, Clothing. | [optional] 
**typeLabel** | **String** | Human-readable label for the item type | [optional] 
**typeWebUrl** | **String** | Web URL for filtering items by type | [optional] 
**subType** | **String** | Item sub-type identifier, e.g. Small, Medium, Rocket. | [optional] 
**subTypeLabel** | **String** | Human-readable label for the item sub-type | [optional] 
**position** | **String** | Only returned for WeaponAttachment items (non-placeholder). Maps sub_type to a display slot name. | [optional] 
**maxMounts** | **int** | Only returned for turret-like items. | [optional] 
**maxMissiles** | **int** | Only returned for MissileLauncher turret-like items. | [optional] 
**maxBombs** | **int** | Only returned for BombLauncher turret-like items. | [optional] 
**minSize** | **int** | Only returned for turret-like items. | [optional] 
**maxSize** | **int** | Only returned for turret-like items. | [optional]
